beIN SPORTS 8.desc_ar: The only previous European meeting between Real Betis and Sporting Braga was in the first leg of this tie, a 1-1 draw, with Betis unbeaten across their last five European games against Portuguese sides. This is the fourth time Braga have visited Spain for a European match – their one win was in a UEFA Champions League qualifier against Sevilla in August 2010, a 4-3 victory. In their other two, they lost 2-0 to Sevilla in November 2006 in the UEFA Cup and 3-0 against Real Madrid in November 2023 in the UEFA Champions League.

beIN SPORTS 1.desc_ar: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid  have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

beIN SPORTS EN 2.title_fr: Nottingham Forest vs Porto - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarts de finale - Retour
beIN SPORTS EN 2.desc_ar: Nottingham Forest have faced Portuguese opposition at home just once in European competition, though that came against Porto when they beat them 2-0 at the City Ground back in October in the league phase of this season’s UEFA Europa League. In their major European history, FC Porto have played 24 away matches in England and have never won. Their only ‘away’ win against an English side was against Chelsea in April 2021 in a UEFA Champions League quarter-final second leg, which was played in Seville due to covid-19 restrictions.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_ar: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid  have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

beIN SPORTS 4.desc_ar: Nottingham Forest have faced Portuguese opposition at home just once in European competition, though that came against Porto when they beat them 2-0 at the City Ground back in October in the league phase of this season’s UEFA Europa League. In their major European history, FC Porto have played 24 away matches in England and have never won. Their only ‘away’ win against an English side was against Chelsea in April 2021 in a UEFA Champions League quarter-final second leg, which was played in Seville due to covid-19 restrictions.
